title: Unity API Quirks and Gotchas
description: Hard-won notes on Unity API behavior that caused failures in real testing sessions

scene_management.issue: Can silently time out on large scenes with many assets
scene_management.workaround: Use editor/run-menu-item with MenuPath='File/Save' as fallback if scene/save hangs

scene_management.issue: Rapid parallel calls can fail silently
scene_management.workaround: Retry up to 3 times with 80ms×attempt backoff (already done in material/set-property)

serialized_properties.issue: Requires Unity's serialized field name with m_ prefix, NOT the C# property name
serialized_properties.workaround: Use component/get_properties to discover exact serialized names

serialized_properties.issue: Not included in basic switch — needs explicit case
serialized_properties.note: Fixed in component/set_property: now supports Color, Vector2, Vector4, Quaternion, ObjectReference

shadergraph.fix: Use Guid.NewGuid().ToString("D") — never ToString("N") or empty string

shadergraph.cause: Unity 14.x+ removed PBRMasterNode and UnlitMasterNode in favor of block-based contexts
shadergraph.fix: Use BlockNode objects in m_VertexContext and m_FragmentContext

shadergraph.cause: VoronoiNode requires m_SGVersion=1 or it silently produces wrong output
Texture sampling is fragment-only; wrong capability causes import errors
shadergraph.fix: Set m_StageCapability=2 for Texture and Sampler inputs in SampleTexture2D/SampleCubemap

shadergraph.cause: VoronoiNode SGVersion=1 requires m_HashType=0 in JSON
shadergraph.fix: Use ExtraFields in NodeDef registry; injected into node JSON by add-node tool

shadergraph.cause: All 5 output slots (Time, Sine Time, Cosine Time, Delta Time, Smooth Delta) must be declared

ui.issue: WorldSpace canvas is invisible without a camera assigned
ui.fix: ui/create_canvas now auto-assigns Camera.main when RenderMode=WorldSpace

particles.issue: URP-only shader lookup fails in Built-in pipeline projects
particles.fix: particle/set-renderer uses cascading fallback: URP Unlit → URP Lit → Standard Unlit → Standard Surface → Unlit/Color

asset_api.issue: Returns null silently if shader not installed or pipeline mismatch
asset_api.fix: Always check for null and return a meaningful error — never create Material(null)

asset_api.issue: Unity rejects asset names with < > : | ? * and control characters
asset_api.fix: script/create now validates with regex before writing

spriteshapeprofile.note: From BuildingWindowLightsSession — verify API names against current package docs
